more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Pressure group Ibhetshu Likazulu withdraws court challenge against Constitutional amendment extending Mnangagwa’s term
more.description: A pressure group, Ibhetshu Likazulu, that had taken the government to court over the controversial “2030 agenda” has abruptly withdrawn its case, saying it was forced to do so after a sustained campaign to discredit the organisation and its leadership. more.title: BLOOD ON THE HIGHWAY: 2 People killed, 7 others injured... The scandalous truth behind the Chegutu-Chinhoyi Highway death trap
more.description: CHINHOYI – The twisted metal of a Nissan Note, its chassis crushed like a discarded soda can, lay silent on the grassy verge of the Chegutu-Chinhoyi highway this past Saturday afternoon. Beside it, the shattered remnants of another vehicle told a story that has become tragically routine on this stretch of tarmac. more.title: 5 Zimbabweans killed and 60 others injured in another cross-border bus accident in South Africa
